FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct TextMetrics

Namespace
FluentGpu.Text
Assembly
FluentGpu.Text.dll

Result of measuring a run: the box the shaped glyphs occupy + the baseline offset from the top, plus the face's decoration metrics — all vertical values measured DOWN from the line top, the same frame as Baseline. UnderlineY/UnderlineThickness place the underline bar and StrikeY the strikethrough bar (it reuses the underline thickness). These feed text decorations; backends without face metrics (the experimental GDI path) leave them 0.

public readonly record struct TextMetrics : IEquatable<TextMetrics>
Implements
IEquatable<TextMetrics>
Inherited Members

ValueType.ToString()

Constructors

TextMetrics(Size2, float, float, float, float)

Result of measuring a run: the box the shaped glyphs occupy + the baseline offset from the top, plus the face's decoration metrics — all vertical values measured DOWN from the line top, the same frame as Baseline. UnderlineY/UnderlineThickness place the underline bar and StrikeY the strikethrough bar (it reuses the underline thickness). These feed text decorations; backends without face metrics (the experimental GDI path) leave them 0.

public TextMetrics(Size2 Size, float Baseline, float UnderlineY = 0, float UnderlineThickness = 0, float StrikeY = 0)

Baseline float
UnderlineY float
UnderlineThickness float
StrikeY float

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
